posts.text: Alexa, cosa succede quando un continente distrugge il concetto di banca centrale e lo sostituisce con un organo politico come la BCE travestendolo da "tecnico"?
posts.author: SantiagoAuFund

posts.text: BIG: Türkiye has sold its S-400 air defense system to a Gulf country — possibly UAE or Qatar. Final details were sorted overnight, and an official announcement is expected today. Source: Turkish journalist Abdülkadir Selvi (Hürriyet)
posts.author: wmiddelkoop
